09b72.content:
Progress snapshot (updated 2026-04-20):
- Completed: PHive runtime and generator rebuilt around PHiveType and PHiveField, %PVR% payload serialization, reusable hook templates, PHiveRouter with tested dynamic routing, PHiveStaticRouter (BoxCollection-backed, initialization-locked), TDD test suite (33 tests / 7 groups).
- Removed: PHiveConsumer and its adapter surfaces retired in favor of the router layer.
- Pending roadmap: PHiveRef generator support (annotation-driven static router config), PHiveProcessor and PHiveDataSource, router-level scope configuration, broader integration tests combining router and hook behavior.
